titleStmt.title: SII 16.315: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 315. (A.R. No. 377 of 1911.) NĀRĀYAṆAVANAM, PUTTUR DIVISION, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the outer gōpura of the Kalyāṇa Veṅkaṭēśaperumāḷ temple.

This inscription is dated Raudri, Bhādrapada ba. 12. The cyclic year seems to be equated to the Śaka year 1544. If the Śaka year quoted is a mistake for 1542 (Raudri), the details correspond to 1620 A.D., September 13, Wednesday.

It records the gift of tolls on various articles of merchandise such as cloth, areca, pepper, jaggery, tamarind etc., to god Kalyāṇa Veṅkaṭēśvara of Nārāyaṇapuram by the chiefs of the mercantile corporation of Ayyāvoḷe headed by Pṛithivīśeṭṭi Rāyaṇamantri Bhāskara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīraudri saṁvvatsara bādrapada ba 12 lu svastiśrī vija
ya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1544 Agunēṁ
rājarājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra veṁkaṭa dēva
lu Ayyavāru penugoṁḍanagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanā
thivisāṁmrājyaṁ śāyagānu . śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara
luva mākarāju tirumalarājayyadēva mahārājuluṁgāru sukha
lai sāmrājyaṁ sēyucunnuṁḍagānu . svastisamasta nijanāmāṁ kārikā
stisamastulaina śrīmadgaṇēśvara gavurīśvaradēvara divyaśrīpādapadmā rādhaku lai
na Ayyāvaḷi mukhyulaina pṛtiviśeṭṭi rāyanamaṁtri bhāskaranna mudalaina svadē
śa paradēśa vubhaya nānādēśastha seṭṭipekkaṁḍulunnu cālumūla samastayāṁbhai
yārudēśālavāru nārāyaṇapuraṁ kalyāṇaveṁkaṭēśvarula kovila
muṁdara ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhulayi kūḍi kū¨rcuṁḍi vicāriṁcu
koṁna vivaramu . kalyāṇaveṁkaṭēśvaraperumāḷaku magama ð 10 ð ma 1 nnu
ruveruku tūṁcukonnavāru piḍi 1 nni Ammēvāru piḍi 1 nni kūḍā maṇu 1 kinni
ḍalu 1 javuḷige pa 100 ki nnu vakkalu miryālu bellaṁ tamala
pākulakunnu pa 1 ki peṟuka 1 kaṁṭlaṁ ṭla 10 ð
vasaṁdhānyaṁ pe 100 ki ð 2 . nu kupe 1 ki ð ciṁtapaṁḍu pe 1 ki = nnu
ḷlipaṭṭupeṭanunnu yīgalavāru svāmiki magama ð 1 ki ð 1 nni kōnalo nārasiṁhva peru
māḷamagama javuḷiki pe 100 ki ð1 nnu davasaṁ pe 100 ki ð . nnu vakkalu miryālu pe 1 ki ð = nnu
yī magamalu Ācaṁdrārka sthāyigānu putrapautra pāraṁparyaṁgānu
The rest of the record is very much damaged.
Digital edition of SII 16.315 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
